message:
docs: Update start_id format to boot_id:start_time:pid in CLI contract

Update all start_id examples in the agent CLI contract to reflect the
robust identity format that handles PID reuse across system reboots.

## Format Change

Old format (vulnerable to PID reuse):
```
"start_id": "1705312200.1234"
```

New format (boot-aware):
```
"start_id": "9d2d4e20-8c2b-4a3a-a8a2-90bcb7a1d86f:123456789:1234"
```

## Structure

The new start_id has three colon-separated components:
1. boot_id: UUID from /proc/sys/kernel/random/boot_id (Linux) or
   equivalent system identifier
2. start_time: Process start time in clock ticks since boot (from
   /proc/[pid]/stat field 22, or ps -o lstart)
3. pid: Process ID

## Why This Matters

The epoch.pid format was insufficient because:
- PIDs can wrap (max ~4 million on Linux, configurable)
- After system reboot, the same PID+start_time could exist
- Long-running systems could see legitimate PID reuse

The boot_id prefix ensures uniqueness across reboots, which is critical
for TOCTOU (time-of-check-time-of-use) protection in robot mode where
we verify identity before sending SIGKILL.

## Updated Sections

- Section 3.1.3 (Plan Output): Action target start_id examples
- Section 3.2 (Candidate Schema): Candidate object start_id field
- Section 5.4 (IDENTITY_MISMATCH): Error response expected/actual IDs

This documentation update aligns with the StartId type implementation
in pt-common and prepares for identity validation in pt agent apply.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -199,7 +199,7 @@ Plans include pre-computed recommendations.
     "preselected_pids": [1234, 5678, 9012],
     "actions": [
       {
-        "target": {"pid": 1234, "start_id": "1705312200.1234"},
+        "target": {"pid": 1234, "start_id": "9d2d4e20-8c2b-4a3a-a8a2-90bcb7a1d86f:123456789:1234"},
         "action": "kill",
         "stage": 1,
         "gates": ["identity_valid", "not_protected"]
@@ -278,7 +278,7 @@ Every candidate in `pt agent plan` output includes these fields (never omitted):
 ```json
 {
   "pid": 1234,
-  "start_id": "1705312200.1234",
+  "start_id": "9d2d4e20-8c2b-4a3a-a8a2-90bcb7a1d86f:123456789:1234",
   "uid": 1000,
   "ppid": 1,
   "cmd_short": "node jest --worker",
@@ -630,8 +630,8 @@ When supervised:
     "code": "IDENTITY_MISMATCH",
     "message": "PID 1234 identity changed since plan was created",
     "details": {
-      "expected_start_id": "1705312200.1234",
-      "actual_start_id": "1705315800.1234"
+      "expected_start_id": "9d2d4e20-8c2b-4a3a-a8a2-90bcb7a1d86f:123456789:1234",
+      "actual_start_id": "9d2d4e20-8c2b-4a3a-a8a2-90bcb7a1d86f:123456990:1234"
     },
     "recoverable": true,
     "recovery_action": "Generate fresh plan with: pt agent plan"
